docket_entries.description: MONEY CLAIM OF PLAINTIFF FOR $821.58 FILED BY DAIL, SANNY AS TO DEFENDANT GAZMIN, JAQUELINE ORDER SETTING TRIAL ISSUED FOR NOV-25-2014 AT 03:30 PM IN DEPT 506

REQUEST TO WAIVE COURT FEES AND COSTS PURSUANT TO G.C. 68633, CRC 3.51, 8.26, AND 8.818 (CONFIDENTIAL) FILED BY PLAINTIFF DAIL, SANNY ORDER FOR WAIVER OF COURT FEES AND COSTS GRANTED PURSUANT TO G.C. 68634 (E), CRC 3.52
PROOF OF SERVICE FILED ON CLAIM OF PLAINTIFF SERVED NOV-04-2014, SUBSTITUTE SERVICE ON NATURAL PERSON AS TO DEFENDANT GAZMIN, JAQUELINE
STIPULATION FOR HEARING BEFORE PRO TEM JUDGE JEAN MILEFF. FILED BY DAIL, SANNY GAZMIN, JAQUELINE

SMALL CLAIMS CALENDAR OF NOV-25-2014 - TAKEN UNDER SUBMISSION AS OF NOV-25-2014 BY JUDGE PRO TEM JEAN MILEFF. PLAINTIFF WAS PRESENT. DEFENDANT WAS PRESENT. DEFENDANT WAIVES UNTIMELY PROOF OF SERVICE IN OPEN COURT. NO COSTS, IFP FILED BY PLAINTIFF. PLAINTIFFS EXHIBITS NOT RETAINED. DEFENDANTS EXHIBITS NOT RETAINED. JUDGE PRO TEM: JEAN MILEFF. CLERK: P. NATT. NOT REPORTED. (506)
SMALL CLAIMS HEARING OF NOV-25-2014 - JUDGMENT.
THE COURT HAS ORDERED THE FOLLOWING JUDGMENT ENTERED: IT IS ADJUDGED THAT PLAINTIFF DAIL, SANNY IS NOT OWED ANY MONEY BY DEFENDANT GAZMIN, JAQUELINE STAY OF EXECUTION 30 DAYS NO EXHIBITS FILED
